title: Memory Palace
description: Memory Palace (Orion series) is a full-color digital video memory and color-space instrument for the Eurorack: capture, rescan, and transform video through frame memory with extensive CV control—built for resynthesis, time smear, and architected feedback paths rather than a “simple buffer.” When this product ships, the in-site Manual is the full reference. Until then, the Specs tab surfaces connector and feature data as we publish it.

seo.title: Memory Palace | LZX Industries
seo.description: Memory Palace: digital video memory and color-space for LZX modular. Specs and docs on lzxindustries.com (Manual when product ships).
